tools.name: configure_datamerge
tools.description: Configure DataMerge API authentication (required before using other tools if DATAMERGE_API_KEY is not set).

tools.name: start_company_enrichment
tools.description: POST /v1/company/enrich. Enrich one or more companies by domain. Returns a job_id (async). Single: domain. Batch: domains, country_code, global_ultimate, list, skip_if_exists.

tools.name: get_company_enrichment_result
tools.description: GET /v1/company/enrich/{job_id}/status. Poll until status is "completed" or "failed". Response includes record_ids. Status values: queued · processing · completed · failed.

tools.name: start_company_enrichment_and_wait
tools.description: POST /v1/company/enrich then poll GET /v1/company/enrich/{job_id}/status until status is "completed" or "failed" or timeout. Same params as start_company_enrichment plus poll_interval_seconds and timeout_seconds.

tools.name: run_company_enrichment
tools.description: Agent-friendly company enrichment. On the first call provide enrichment params (domain, domains, company_name, country_code, etc.); the server starts the job and polls internally for up to ~25s. If the job is still running, the response will be {status:"pending", continuation_token, attempt, elapsed

tools.name: run_contact_enrich
tools.description: Agent-friendly contact enrichment. On the first call provide contacts and enrich_fields; the server starts the job and polls internally for up to ~25s. If still running, returns {status:"pending", continuation_token, attempt, elapsed_seconds} — you MUST immediately call run_contact_enrich again with

tools.name: run_contact_search
tools.description: Agent-friendly contact search. On the first call provide domains and enrich_fields; the server starts the job and polls internally for up to ~25s. If still running, returns {status:"pending", continuation_token, attempt, elapsed_seconds} — you MUST immediately call run_contact_search again with only

tools.name: get_company
tools.description: Get a single company record. GET /v1/company/get?datamerge_id={id} or ?record_id={uuid}. Provide either datamerge_id (charges 1 credit) or record_id (free). Not both. Optional: add_to_list — list slug to add the company to (only with datamerge_id).

tools.name: get_company_hierarchy
tools.description: Get all entities in the same global ultimate hierarchy. GET /v1/company/hierarchy?datamerge_id={id}. Parameters: include_names (bool, charges 1 credit), include_branches (bool), only_subsidiaries (bool), max_level (int), country_code (array), page (int).

tools.name: contact_search
tools.description: POST /v1/contact/search. Search for contacts at specified companies. Returns a job_id (async, 202). enrich_fields required (at least one of contact.emails or contact.phones). Use company_list (slug) instead of domains to search a saved list.

tools.name: get_contact_search_status
tools.description: GET /v1/contact/search/{job_id}/status. Poll until status is "completed" or "failed". Response includes record_ids.

tools.name: contact_enrich
tools.description: POST /v1/contact/enrich. Enrich specific contacts by LinkedIn URL or name+domain. Returns a job_id (async, 202).

tools.name: get_contact_enrich_status
tools.description: GET /v1/contact/enrich/{job_id}/status. Poll until status is "completed" or "failed". Response includes record_ids.

tools.name: get_contact
tools.description: GET /v1/contact/get?record_id={uuid}. Retrieve a specific contact by record UUID. Never charges credits.

tools.name: list_lists
tools.description: GET /v1/lists. Optional: object_type=company or object_type=contact.

tools.name: create_list
tools.description: POST /v1/lists. Body: name, object_type (company or contact).

tools.name: get_list_items
tools.description: GET /v1/lists/{object_type}/{list_slug}. object_type: company or contact. list_slug: e.g. target-accounts. Parameters: page, page_size (max 100), sort_by, sort_order (asc/desc).

tools.name: remove_list_item
tools.description: DELETE /v1/lists/{object_type}/{list_slug}/{item_id}.

tools.name: delete_list
tools.description: DELETE /v1/lists/{object_type}/{list_slug}. System lists cannot be deleted.

tools.name: get_credits_balance
tools.description: GET /v1/credits/balance. Returns credits_balance and balances (one_off, recurring, rollover, total).

tools.name: health_check
tools.description: Check if the DataMerge API client is configured and can connect. Uses /auth/info.

tools.name: contact_search_unenriched
tools.description: POST /v1/contact/search/unenriched. Find contacts without running email/phone enrichment. Returns a job_id; contacts are created in `unconfirmed` status with stable ids. BETA: requires the `contact_search_unenriched` flag on the account.

tools.name: run_contact_search_unenriched
tools.description: POST /v1/contact/search/unenriched/sync. Synchronous unenriched contact search — returns contacts inline (no polling). Requires the `contact_search_unenriched` beta flag. Limits: 10 domains and max_results_per_company ≤ 10. Response includes credits_consumed computed as 0.5 × len(contacts).

findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "configure_datamerge" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Configure DataMerge API authentication (required before using other tools if DATAMERGE_API_KEY is not set).

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "configure_datamerge" references sensitive artifacts (api_key). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Configure DataMerge API authentication (required before using other tools if DATAMERGE_API_KEY is not set).

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp.datamerge.ai" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: start_company_enrichment, start_company_enrichment_and_wait, contact_search, create_list, contact_search_unenriched, run_contact_search_unenriched · Private data: run_company_enrichment, run_contact_enrich, run_contact_search, get_company, contact_search, get_contact_search_status, contact_enrich, get_contact_enrich_status, get_contact, list_lists, create_list, get_list_items, contact_search_unenriched, run_contact_search_unenriched · Public sink: start_company_enrichment, start_company_enrichment_and_wait, contact_search, contact_enrich, create_list, contact_search_unenriched, run_contact_search_unenriched · Destructive: run_company_enrichment, run_contact_enrich, run_contact_search, remove_list_item, delete_list, run_contact_search_unenriched.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: start_company_enrichment, start_company_enrichment_and_wait, contact_search, create_list, contact_search_unenriched, run_contact_search_unenriched · Private data: run_company_enrichment, run_contact_enrich, run_contact_search, get_company, contact_search, get_contact_search_status, contact_enrich, get_contact_enrich_status, get_contact, list_lists, create_list, get_list_items, contact_search_unenriched, run_contact_search_unenriched · Public sink: start_company_enrichment, start_company_enrichment_and_wait, contact_search, contact_enrich, create_list, contact_search_unenriched, run_contact_search_unenriched · Destructive: run_company_enrichment, run_contact_enrich, run_contact_search, remove_list_item, delete_list, run_contact_search_unenriched

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
